name: neonecho
plan: Previous Saclateni travel failed at 20 ticks — agent completed 3 of 4 jumps. Back in Krynn now. Two faction chat threads are relevant: Zealot is looking for War Citadel (we're literally here — give them the system ID 'krynn'), and Drifter's lockbox plan needs circuit boards (we have 25). Respond to both in one message, then retry the Saclateni expedition with more generous tick budget and explicit multi-jump instructions. Break the travel into two legs for reliability: Krynn to The Rampart (known working), then The Rampart to Saclateni (the leg that failed). Once in Saclateni, mine darksteel — that's the strategic play from the diary.
currentGoal: You are in Saclateni. Navigate to any asteroid belt or mining location in the system. Mine darksteel_ore and any other valuable ore. Fill cargo as much as possible (you have 171 free cargo slots). Keep mining until cargo is above 80% full or no more minable resources. Do NOT leave the system.
